identificationModule.briefTitle: Imaging Eligibility Study in Advanced Solid Tumors
identificationModule.officialTitle: A Phase 2 Study of Imaging Eligibility and Radiographic Response in Advanced Solid Tumors

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:
* Histologically confirmed breast cancer, non-small cell lung cancer, gastrointestinal cancer, or other advanced solid tumor requiring palliative radiation are eligible
* Participants with primary brain tumors or active CNS metastases may enroll if clinically stable
* Able to provide written informed consent and comply with protocol procedures

Exclusion Criteria:
* Adults unable to consent
* Unable to comply with protocol procedures
* Contraindication to MRI due to claustrophobia
* Unable to remain still during MRI acquisition
* Presence of an MR-incompatible pacemaker or other implanted device
* Pregnant women
* Receiving systemic corticosteroids within 14 days before enrollment
* Uncontrolled infection, uncontrolled diabetes, or connective tissue disease
* Prior radiation therapy within 14 days before baseline imaging
